fields.title: Fix tool args wrapping in agent display
fields.description:
Tool args in the agent expanded view are wrapping across multiple lines even though they should stay on one line. The truncation with '...' works, but the line breaks at spaces.

Current broken output shows bash command split across lines at spaces.

Expected output is single line with truncation at the end.

The issue is that the TUI Text widget is wordu002dwrapping the line at spaces. We need to prevent this wrapping for tool args lines.

File: extensions/tau/src/agent/render.ts
Function: renderTools
fields.design:
The renderTools function builds strings that get passed to new Text(...). The piu002dtui Text widget wordu002dwraps at spaces.

Fix options:
1. Use nonu002dbreaking spaces (U+00A0) in args to prevent wrapping
2. Check if piu002dtui Text has nou002dwrap option
3. Manually handle wrapping by measuring widths

Recommended: Option 1 u002d replace regular spaces in args with nonu002dbreaking spaces so the TUI treats the args as one word.
fields.close_reason: Fixed: Replaced spaces with non-breaking spaces (u00A0) in tool args to prevent TUI word-wrapping. Typecheck passed.
